creator: pallgone@gmail.com
text:
I'm also experiencing this problem on freebsd 8.0-RELEASE-p2 with linux-nx-
client-3.4.0

The session fails with the following in the details:
Error: Failed to set TCP_NODELAY flag on FD#13 to 1. Error is 22 'Invalid 
argument'.

Can I do something about it?

Thanks
Pallgone
